overall.description: A third-person game sequence following a character in a dark suit walking through a snowy, gothic castle environment at night. The character moves from a covered stone archway across an open bridge with mountain views, then along a path lined with statues and trees.

events.description: exiting the covered stone archway into the open snowy landscape

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered stone archway toward the bright exit ahead

large arched exit opening revealing snowy night landscape beyond

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, covered stone archway illuminated by warm wall lanterns. The dark stone corridor creates an enclosed atmosphere as the character approaches the bright archway exit ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow-covered bridge with mountain vista

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway, the scene opens to a wide, snow-covered bridge with ornate stone railings. The character pauses to take in the expansive mountain vista visible under the night sky, illuminated by warm street lamps, before continuing forward.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snow-covered path bordered by stone railings, with distant castle towers visible on the left. Another pedestrian passes by walking in the opposite direction. Large stone lion statues with lanterns appear ahead as the path continues.

agents.ego_description: walking through the tree-lined avenue toward distant lights on the horizon

snow-covered deciduous trees forming an avenue along the path
faint warm lights visible in the far distance along the path

segments.scene_description: Passing the stone lion statues, the environment transitions to a tree-lined avenue with snow-covered branches arching overhead. The character continues walking toward distant lights visible far ahead along the dark snowy path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, lantern-lit stone corridor into an expansive, snow-covered gothic estate at night. It begins within a narrow covered archway where warm wall lanterns illuminate the dark stone, moving forward until the enclosed space opens onto a wide bridge with ornate railings. As the character pauses to take in a vast mountain vista under the night sky, the scene shifts toward a snow-dusted path where distant castle towers loom and a passing pedestrian crosses their way. The camera then glides past imposing stone lion statues with lanterns before the environment transitions into a tree-lined avenue with snow-covered branches arching overhead. Finally, the path stretches forward into the darkness, leading the character toward distant lights visible in the far distance.
